productDisplayName: Peter England Men Elements Beige Wallet
description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this wallet holder from peter england is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Peter England perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic piece.Dimensions: 10.3 cm x 9.6 cmTwo main compartmentsA flap on the left side with card holder slots on the top and a mesh pocket on the other sideAn id card slot on the left sideTwo slip pockets for coins on either sideThree card holder slots on the right sideBranding embossed on the frontContrast coloured innerCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
